reviews.comment:
Buen lugar donde hacer una parada a la vuelta de un viaje, Para tomar algo y descansar abajo de algunos de los eucaliptos que hay!

(Translated by Google)
A great place to stop on the way back from a trip, to have a drink and rest under some of the eucalyptus trees!

reviews.comment:
Como todo ACA sumamente limpio y con personal muy atento. Area recreativa muy util para estirar las piernas antrs de continuar viaje.

(Translated by Google)
Like all ACA hotels, it's extremely clean and the staff is very attentive. The recreational area is very useful for stretching your legs before continuing your journey.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2813003656748655180/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUN3bkxhU0dnEAE

reviewer.displayName: Necochea Movilidad Eléct. Arena, Sol y Playa !!!

reviews.comment:
Llegué por la noche, el servicio fue rápido y como en toda ACA el detalle por parte del playero de limpiar el parabrisas. Excelente y buena higiene de sanitarios/baño.

(Translated by Google)
I arrived at night, the service was quick, and as always at ACA, the attendant thoughtfully cleaned my windshield. The restrooms were excellent and very clean.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2813003656748655180/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURBN01HNVdnEAE
